overview: Jund Gardens is a Pauper midrange deck that leverages land sacrifice and life gain to outlast opponents while applying steady pressure. By converting lands into card advantage and board wipes, it disrupts traditional mana bases and controls the pace of the game. The strategy relies on efficient removal, resilient creatures, and timely land destruction to close out matches.
win_conditions: Trading lands for life and card advantage to outvalue opponents
Using Defile to disrupt enemy mana while maintaining board presence
Sacrificing creatures with Fanatical Offering to stabilize and close out games

keep_criteria: Hands with early land drops and a removal spell
Combinations featuring Fanatical Offering and a creature to sacrifice
Defile paired with a way to play it on curve
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early land interaction or card draw
Overloaded hands with multiple Defiles and no creatures
Hands missing a clear path to turn two or three

early_game: Play lands and cheap creatures to establish board presence
Use Fanatical Offering on turn two or three to gain life and remove threats
Hold Defile for when opponent commits to a large land drop
mid_game: Cycle lands into card advantage using Lembas and other sac outlets
Trade efficiently to keep the board clear while gaining life
Apply pressure with resilient creatures while waiting for opponent to run out of resources
late_game: Use Defile to strip opponent's mana base if they are ahead
Sacrifice remaining lands and creatures to stabilize and close out
Rely on life total and card advantage to outlast aggressive strategies

key_cards.name: Fanatical Offering
key_cards.notes: Use on opponent's threats or your own creatures to stabilize and gain tempo. Prioritize sacrificing high-power creatures for maximum life gain.

key_cards.name: Lembas
key_cards.notes: Sacrifice to draw a card when you need answers or to cycle into better resources. Keep it on the board to pressure opponents while waiting for removal.

key_cards.name: Defile
key_cards.notes: Cast when opponent has multiple lands untapped or after they play a key spell. Use it to disrupt mana while your board remains intact due to life gain and sac outlets.

sequencing_tips: Hold Defile until after opponent's main phase to maximize land disruption
Sacrifice creatures with Fanatical Offering before casting Defile to preserve life total
Use Lembas for card draw when you have a full board or need specific answers

matchups.advice: Prioritize early Fanatical Offering to gain life and remove threats. Hold Defile for when they go wide.
Apply steady pressure and use Defile to disrupt their late-game mana. Sacrifice lands to draw cards and outvalue them.
Race them by leveraging life gain and land sacrifice. Use Defile to break their mana curve.
